channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Did Kioxia just unveil the fastest SSD ever? GP series uses Storage Class Memory to feed the HBM GPU with millions of IOPS
item.description: Kioxia launches GP Series SSD using Storage Class Memory to expand GPU-accessible memory, targeting high-performance AI workloads and millions of IOPS.

item.title: The Daniels’ Next Big Movie Is a Return to Sci-Fi
item.description: The 'Everything Everywhere All at Once' duo will back on the big screen with a new film, and it already sounds like it'll be classic Daniels.

item.title: The SEC drops its four-year-old investigation into EV startup Faraday Future
item.description: After four years, and multiple subpoenas and depositions, the beleaguered startup has dodged yet another bullet.

item.title: Do you want to build a robot snowman?
item.description: On the latest episode of the Equity podcast, we recapped CEO Jensen Huang’s GTC keynote and debated what it means for Nvidia’s future.

item.title: Apple Store Prices for SanDisk SSDs Are Suddenly Astronomical
Le site idéal pour enfin comprendre l’origine de la vie et l'exobiologie sans se perdre
item.description: L'origine et la place de la vie dans l'Univers sont parmi les questions les plus profondes qu'Homo sapiens se pose depuis des millénaires. Depuis un peu moins d'un siècle, des réponses partielles ont été apportées de façon scientifique dans le cadre d'une nouvelle science : l'exobiologie. Un...

item.title: You thought the generalist was dead — in the 'vibe work' era, they're more important than ever
item.description: Not long ago, the idea of being a “generalist” in the workplace had a mixed reputation. The stereotype was the “jack of all trades” who could dabble in many disciplines but was a “master of none.” And for years, that was more or less true. Most people simply didn’t have access to the expertise required to do highly cross-functional work. If you needed a new graphic, you waited for a designer. If you needed to change a contract, you waited for legal. In smaller organizations and startups, this waiting game was typically replaced with inaction or improvization — often with questionable results.A...

item.title: Le path tracing : qu’est-ce que c’est et qu’est-ce que ça change dans nos jeux vidéo ?
item.description: Depuis quelques années, le ray tracing s’est imposé comme l’un des grands bouleversements graphiques du jeu vidéo sur PC et consoles nouvelle génération. Mais une autre technologie fait parler d’elle depuis des années, encore plus ambitieuse et exigeante : le path tracing. Qu'est-ce que c'est, et comment ça marche ?

item.title: RIP Sam Kieth, Comic Book Artist and ‘Sandman’ Co-Creator
item.description: Throughout his career, the fan-favorite artist touched DC and Marvel characters and made his own work like 'The Maxx' and 'Zero Girl.'

item.title: La toute nouvelle enceinte Bluetooth Sonos Play a du coffre, surtout avec une petite remise pour son lancement
item.description: La Sonos Play est une enceinte Bluetooth aussi bien utilisable à la maison en résidentiel qu'en mode nomade, qui vient tout juste de sortir. Pourtant, avec un code promo, elle passe déjà de 349,99 euros à 329,99 euros sur Boulanger.

item.title: Cursor admits its new coding model was built on top of Moonshot AI’s Kimi
item.description: Building on top of a Chinese model feels particularly fraught right now.

item.title: Crimson Desert developer apologizes and promises to replace AI-generated art
item.description: The developer behind the open-world RPG Crimson Desert has issued an official apology after players discovered several instances of AI-generated art in the game. Pearl Abyss posted on X that it released the game with some 2D visual props that were made with "experimental AI generative tools" and forgot to replace them before launch. We would like to address questions regarding the use of AI in Crimson Desert.During development, some 2D visual props were created as part of early-stage iteration using experimental AI generative tools. These assets helped us rapidly explore tone and atmosphere in...

item.title: System76 is charging an eye-popping $5299 for an Nvidia GeForce RTX 5090 GPU upgrade on its latest PC: Video card dwarves RAM cost in latest Thelio Mira Linux computer
item.description: System76’s Thelio Mira Linux desktop offers Ryzen 9000 CPUs, up to 192GB DDR5, and supports Nvidia RTX 5090 GPUs.
